overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City, beginning near a building with Valentinos gang graffiti, proceeding through narrow streets beneath elevated highways, and emerging into a busy sunlit intersection with futuristic traffic and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley beside parking garage with gang graffiti

events.description: turns corner from rose graffiti building into narrow street beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking past the Valentinos gang graffiti and turning right into a narrow alleyway

entered.detail: large red rose with thorns painted on building wall, Valentinos gang symbol
multi-story concrete parking structure with horizontal slats and dark windows
large holographic advertisement for All Foods with red and yellow graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beside a parking garage adorned with a large red rose graffiti mural. The camera turns right into a narrow alley, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The All Foods billboard becomes visible in the distance as the scene transitions into a more enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the shaded street beneath the massive elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal overpass with support columns and curved ramps overhead
tall modern street light with horizontal arm extending over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the shadow of a massive elevated highway, the scene is characterized by concrete architecture and dim lighting. Parked cars line the right side of the street while pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction. The All Foods billboard remains visible ahead as the camera progresses down the narrow corridor.

events.description: approaching brighter area as the street opens up toward the sunlit intersection

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection with increasing pedestrian traffic and activity

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying VARGAS with dramatic red and black graphics
multiple floating holographic ads and signs above the street level

segments.scene_description: The street gradually opens up as the camera approaches a major intersection. Large digital billboards including the prominent Vargas advertisement become visible on the left, while holographic advertisements float above on the right. The lighting brightens significantly as the camera moves toward the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with heavy traffic and holographic advertisements

events.description: steps into direct sunlight while crossing the intersection, creating lens flare
futuristic cars and trucks drive past on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy intersection through bright sunlight with heavy vehicle traffic on both sides

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street with headlights on
yellow utility truck passing through the intersection

entered.detail: various futuristic cars and vehicles moving on the multi-lane road
black and yellow striped bollards separating sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shaded corridor into a bright sunlit intersection, the camera crosses the street amidst dense futuristic traffic. The Vargas billboard looms larger on the left while various vehicles including a yellow truck and black sedan navigate the intersection. The scene is dominated by harsh sunlight and long shadows cast across the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit downtown sidewalk alongside busy traffic

events.description: catches up to and follows character with distinctive mohawk hairstyle

agents.ego_description: walking behind a character with a distinctive mohawk hairstyle and black jacket along the sunlit sidewalk

notable_agents.action: NPC with distinctive mohawk and black jacket walking ahead, identified as Jackie Welles

entered.detail: holographic advertisement for NCola soft drink with white and red branding

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sunlit sidewalk, the camera follows closely behind a character with a distinctive mohawk hairstyle. The NCola billboard becomes visible on the right while the Vargas billboard recedes into the distance on the left. Traffic continues to flow alongside the sidewalk separated by barrier posts, and a blue UI interaction prompt appears indicating the ability to talk to the character ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shaded urban alleyway into a bright, bustling futuristic intersection. It begins beside a parking garage featuring a red rose graffiti mural, turning right into a narrow corridor where pedestrians pass by and an All Foods billboard appears in the distance. As the camera moves deeper into the city, the environment shifts into the dim shadow of a massive elevated highway lined with parked cars and concrete architecture. The scene then opens and brightens significantly as the camera approaches a major intersection, where holographic advertisements and a large Vargas billboard emerge from the gloom. Finally, the camera emerges into harsh sunlight and long shadows, crossing through dense traffic and following a character with a mohawk along a sidewalk past an NCola billboard.
